curation_notes: The patch commit fb49be9 modifies only one non-test source file (signer/sign_state.go). The vulnerability was in the Save method which called GetErrorIfLessOrEqual (with its own lock) and then cacheAndMarshal (with a separate lock), creating a TOCTOU race condition. The fix combines both operations into a single blockDoubleSign method under one mutex lock. Locations derived from the patch diff, consistent with the advisory description of the split read-write lock pattern in signature state handling.
